plan_brief: Detect the green cube object, estimate its top grasp pose, move to pre-grasp pose then grasp pose, close the gripper to complete grasping, then retreat and return to global observation pose
program:
debug("Starting green cube detection")
green_cube = detect_object_by_text("green cube")
debug("Estimating top grasp pose for green cube")
grasp_pose = estimate_top_grasp_pose(green_cube)
debug("Building pre-grasp pose above the target")
pregrasp_pose = build_pregrasp_pose(grasp_pose)
debug("Opening gripper to prepare for grasp")
open_gripper()
debug("Moving to pre-grasp pose")
move_to_pose(pregrasp_pose)
debug("Moving down to grasp pose")
move_to_pose(grasp_pose)
debug("Closing gripper to grasp the cube")
close_gripper()
debug("Stabilizing the grasp")
stabilize_grasp()
debug("Retreating upward after grasp")
retreat()
debug("Returning to global observe pose")
return_to_observe_pose()
